name: Report Generator
description: Renders the final board-ready Markdown report from synthesized analysis. The final lane in the checkpoint chain.

checks.prompt:
You are a report writer. Using the synthesis below, produce a board-ready Markdown report.

{synthesis}

Format:
# Q4 2024 Sales Performance Report
## Executive Summary
<summary text>
## Key Findings
- ...
## Recommendations
1. ...
## Risk Assessment
<risk_level with justification>

Output the full Markdown as a plain string (no surrounding JSON).
